prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTWBPSWAT-9PC-STD-RD-2 Product Type: SOLDERING_IRON Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Arts and Craft Hobby Kit 9 Piece Wood Burning Pen Burn-in Hand Tool Description: Add some flare to any wood working project with the 9pc Universal Tool Wood Burning Pen & Soldering Tips Set.

The 9pc Wood Burning Pen & Soldering Tips Set is a great addition to your wood working or soldering tool collection. This set comes with everything you'll need for your wood working projects: a wood burning pen, 6 assorted soldering tips, hot knife chuck for hot blade and a safety stand. It has 25 watt power, 110-120V 60Hz and is UL Approved EZ14195.

This set is great for wood working, hobbies, crafting, home improvement and more. Make sure to grab one before your next project. Search Terms: DIY art craft wood working carving tools chiseling hobby chisel tips burning tool razertip burner pyrography kit woodburning craft supplies pens interchangeable burners Features: - Universal Tool Wood Burning Pen & Assorted Tips Set, 9 Total Pieces - Ideal for beginner craft hobbyist. Ideal arts and craft hobby Christmas gift - COMPONENTS INCLUDED: Safety Stand, Hot Chuck, Wood Pen, (6) Interchangeable Tips: (2) Brass wood burning tips, (2) Steel soldering tips, (1) Steel chiseled tip, (1) Hot razor blade - PERFORMS MULTIPLE FUNCTIONS: Leather Burning, Wood burning, Soldering, Chiseling, Melting, Cutting - SPECIFICATIONS: Watts: 25w; Voltage: 110V-120V; Frequency: 60Hz; UL listed; Length: 7-3/4" ; Long electrical cord attached for a wide range of movement - Great for Wood Working, Soldering, Metal Working, Hobby, Craft, Home Improvement & More! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
